name: Have tea in the sonaria!
description:
I didn't want to release this bot, simply because I don't like it, but after thinking for a while, I decided to make it public in case anyone is interested.

enjoy your tea! do whatever you want! :D

English is not my native language, so please report any mistakes!

(This bot can often confuse creatures/spout nonsense and such. I have no idea how to fix it, lol.)

By the way, I made an angelic warden toy. I love that fluffy, feathered bastard. :P

angelic warden ardor warden Zohutek Serphelius Leurimess hyboria Cimmabu valkyrie creatures of sonaria
creator: Tenderness
